# cloudflare_ai_gateway (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `account_id` (String) The Account ID to use for the AI Gateway.
- `id` (String) AI Gateway identifier.

### Optional

- `authentication` (Boolean) Enable authentication on the gateway.
- `cache_invalidate_on_update` (Boolean) Invalidate the cache on update.
- `cache_ttl` (Number) Cache TTL in seconds.
- `collect_logs` (Boolean) Collect logs from the gateway.
- `dlp` (Attributes) Data Loss Prevention configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--dlp))
- `is_default` (Boolean) Whether this is the default gateway.
- `log_management` (Number) Log management setting.
- `log_management_strategy` (String) Available values: "STOP_INSERTING", "DROP_WHEN_FULL", "NO_SQL".
- `logpush` (Boolean) Enable logpush.
- `logpush_public_key` (String) Logpush public key.
- `otel` (Attributes List) OpenTelemetry configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--otel))
- `rate_limiting_interval` (Number) Rate limiting interval in seconds.
- `rate_limiting_limit` (Number) Rate limiting limit.
- `rate_limiting_technique` (String) Available values: "fixed", "sliding".
- `store_id` (String) Store ID for logs.
- `stripe` (Attributes) Stripe configuration for billing. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--stripe))
- `workers_ai_billing_mode` (String) Available values: "postpaid", "prepaid".
- `zdr` (Boolean) Enable Zero Downtime Requirements.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when the AI Gateway was created.
- `modified_at` (String) The timestamp when the AI Gateway was last modified.

<a id="nestedatt--dlp"></a>
### Nested Schema for `dlp`

Optional:

- `action` (String) Available values: "BLOCK", "WARN".
- `enabled` (Boolean) Enable DLP.
- `profiles` (List of String) List of DLP profile IDs.


<a id="nestedatt--otel"></a>
### Nested Schema for `otel`

Optional:

- `authorization` (String) Authorization header value.
- `content_type` (String) Available values: "json", "proto".
- `headers` (Map of String) Additional headers to include in OTEL requests.
- `url` (String) OTEL collector URL.


<a id="nestedatt--stripe"></a>
### Nested Schema for `stripe`

Optional:

- `authorization` (String, Sensitive) Stripe authorization token.
- `usage_events` (Attributes List) Usage events configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--stripe--usage_events))

<a id="nestedatt--stripe--usage_events"></a>
### Nested Schema for `stripe.usage_events`

Optional:

- `payload` (String) Event payload.

## Import


~> This resource does not currently support `terraform import`.
